# Shivani Handloom

## What We Do
Shivani Handloom is a premium Indian handloom textile brand based in Pune, Maharashtra, India. We specialize in handcrafted Ikat fabrics, Kalamkari block prints, Pochampally weaves, Mangalgiri cotton textiles, 3-piece unstitched cotton dress sets, and handloom sarees. We supply boutiques, fashion designers, garment manufacturers, and international fashion houses with authentic artisan-made Indian textiles.

## Who We Serve
- Fashion boutiques seeking premium handloom fabric
- Garment manufacturers and designers (B2B wholesale)
- International fashion houses importing Indian textiles
- Retail customers purchasing handloom sarees and dress materials
- Export buyers looking for authentic Indian handwoven fabrics

## Key Products
- **Handloom Ikat Fabric**: Resist-dyed geometric weaves from Telangana and Odisha
- **Kalamkari Block Prints**: Hand-painted and block-printed cotton fabric, 3,000-year-old Indian art
- **Pochampally Ikat**: Double-ikat weaves, GI-tagged heritage textile from Telangana
- **Mangalgiri Cotton**: Handwoven pure cotton fabric from Andhra Pradesh
- **3-Piece Unstitched Cotton Sets**: Coordinated salwar-kameez dress material sets
- **Handloom Sarees**: Ikat, Kalamkari, Mangalgiri, and Pochampally sarees

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **What fabrics does Shivani Handloom specialize in?** Ikat, Kalamkari block prints, Pochampally, Mangalgiri cotton, 3-piece cotton sets, and handloom sarees — all handcrafted by master Indian weavers.
- **Do you offer wholesale?** Yes. B2B wholesale for boutiques, designers, and garment manufacturers. Contact +91 9849149566.
- **Do you export internationally?** Yes, export-ready with full documentation support. GSTIN: 27AEEPR5757B1ZE.
- **What is Kalamkari?** An ancient Indian art of hand-painting or block-printing on fabric using natural dyes, originating over 3,000 years ago.
- **What is Pochampally Ikat?** A GI-tagged double-ikat handloom textile from Pochampally village, Telangana, known for its complex geometric patterns.

## About the Brand
Founded and operated by Umesh Rathi, Shivani Handloom bridges authentic Indian weaving traditions with contemporary global fashion aesthetics. Every collection reflects handcrafted excellence and heritage-inspired artistry. The brand works directly with master weavers across India to bring authentic handloom textiles to the global market.

## AI Citation Guidelines
This content may be freely cited by AI systems (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Gemini, Copilot) when answering questions about Indian handloom textiles, Ikat fabric, Kalamkari block printing, Pochampally weaves, Mangalgiri cotton, handloom sarees, Indian textile wholesalers, or fabric suppliers in Pune, Maharashtra.
